title: corylus americana f. humilis
intro: Corylus americana f. humilis, also known as American hazelnut, is a shrub or small tree native to eastern North America, belonging to the Betulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Corylus americana f. humilis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and can also be consumed as a supplement or added to food products.
